debug_info.goal:
α : Type
hα : OracleComp.SampleableType α
x : Bool
⊢ x ∈
    support
      (@OracleComp.HasUniformSelect!.uniformSelect! (Vector Bool 2) Bool (OracleComp.hasUniformSelectVector Bool 1)
        #v[true, false])

failed_attempts:
simp [hasUniformSelectVector, support_map, Set.mem_range]
    cases x with
    | false => exact ⟨1, rfl⟩
    | true => exact ⟨0, rfl⟩

    · exact ⟨0, rfl⟩
